summary: Allowlist and quote generated SQL identifiers in exported store helper functions.
reason: ListIDs and ResolveByName interpolate table names and JSON-path keys because SQLite cannot bind identifiers; generated helper inputs must be identifier-shaped before interpolation.
validated_outcome: TestListIDsRejectsUnsafeResourceTableIdentifier and TestResolveByNameRejectsUnsafeMatchField verify unsafe strings are not interpolated.
